lawful_basis: legitimate_interest (Art 6(1)(f) GDPR) for B2B role-based outreach
opt_out_mechanism: One-click unsubscribe link in every email + plain-text reply 'unsubscribe'
sender_identification_required: Yes - full Impressum incl company address
prior_consent_required: No - B2B only if relevant to role
notes: UWG §7(2) BGH ruling allows B2B cold email if (a) role-relevant offer (b) sender identified (c) easy opt-out
UoSE Art 10 historically required prior consent - 2018 UODO clarification: B2B role-relevant exempt

lawful_basis: legitimate_interest (B2B exemption from PECR Reg 22 consent)
prior_consent_required: No for B2B corporate subscribers (PECR Reg 22 exempts corporate beneficiaries)
notes: ICO guidance: PECR consent rule applies only to individual subscribers - corporate sole traders unclear so default opt-in for them

lawful_basis: legitimate_interest + processing for B2B contract performance preparation
prior_consent_required: No for B2B if necessary for proposed transaction
notes: UAE PDPL still maturing - conservative approach: full opt-out + clear sender ID

prior_consent_required: Recommended for high-volume - first wave low volume OK on LI
notes: SDAIA enforcement increasing 2026 - keep audit log of every send + opt-out

prior_consent_required: No for B2B legal persons if role-relevant
notes: Wave 1.5. NL spam rule (Telecomwet 11.7) allows B2B to legal persons w/ opt-out; natural-person ZZP'ers (sole traders) are individuals -> default opt-in / skip those. Autoriteit Persoonsgegevens enforces AVG.
